changes: Hardened screen-aware agent launches, tool schemas, and realtime tool error reporting.
Improved desktop chat screen-context detection and diagnostics
Background agent chat links now reopen from the timeline even after pills dismiss
Fixed Background agent cards so the header collapses again, markdown renders in the expanded body, and the open-agent link hides when the agent is unavailable
Fixed floating bar treating block-only or artifact answers as failed empty responses
Fixed silent agent-link opens and restored background-agent chat continuity after pills dismiss
Fixed a main-thread freeze where chat text selection wrapped agent card headers and pegged CPU
Show typed notch, notch PTT, and spawned-agent link turns in the shared Omi chat history
Background agent cards and proactive notifications now stay consistent across chat surfaces after reload

Fixed continuity review findings: restage can create a missing assistant after a user-only stage, owner-swap clear no longer clobbers a mid-session auth uid, agent open ordering is generation-guarded, and agent cards hide dead Open links / avoid false-success status icons
Floating bar chat now reads from the shared chat timeline instead of keeping a separate copy
Attach Gemini push-to-talk screen frames immediately after activity start instead of at commit so current-screen questions have time to ground on the image
Send Gemini push-to-talk screen frames inside the active voice turn before commit so screen questions ground on current pixels instead of a too-late screenshot tool call
Fixed Home chat input focus after expansion and added Escape-to-Home navigation on secondary Home pages
Polished the desktop Home stage layout, wider chat surface, responsive ask bar, and icon-only notch thinking state

Fixed notch and chat so agent artifacts stay attached to the turn that produced them, old orphan artifact cards no longer appear in the floating viewport, and agent list/card previews show the prompt instead of the response
Fixed a test-owner swap that could wipe sign-in tokens and break chat loading until relaunch

Make push-to-talk screen context fresher and less brittle by prefetching canonical voice-turn screen context while the user speaks and preventing stale screenshot OCR from biasing transcript correction
Made push-to-talk screen context prefer live capture when finalized screen frames are more than a few seconds old
PTT now tries available Omi context before asking follow-up questions and delegates larger work to background agents when a short voice answer is not the right surface
Fixed duplicate chat messages after push-to-talk
Buffered push-to-talk screen context until realtime sessions are ready so cold starts and reconnects do not drop it
Fixed subagent chats so completed agents show their final output and stop showing stale Running or Working indicators
Keep main chat subagent links visible without showing completed implementation-only tool logs, and keep externally spawned agent pills synced to terminal runtime state
